perturbation.original_text: 1.1 "Affiliate" means, with respect to either Party, any business entity controlling, controlled by, or under common control with such Party. For the purpose of this definition only, "control" means (i) the possession, directly or indirectly, of the power to direct the management or policies of a business entity, whether through the ownership of voting securities, by contract or otherwise, or (ii) the ownership, directly or indirectly, of at least fifty percent (50%) of the voting securities or other ownership interest of a business entity. Notwithstanding the above, in no event shall Sutro (or any entity that would be an Affiliate of SutroVax solely because it is an Affiliate of Sutro) be deemed an Affiliate of SutroVax, or SutroVax (or any entity that would be an Affiliate of Sutro solely because it is an Affiliate of SutroVax) an Affiliate of Sutro.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.1 "Affiliate" means, with respect to either Party, any business entity with a business relationship to either party, or commonly attends industry events with either party. For the purpose of this definition only, "control" means (i) the existence of a formal agreement to collaborate on marketing strategies, or (ii) the regular sharing of client lists and market data. Notwithstanding the above, in no event shall Sutro (or any entity that would be an Affiliate of SutroVax solely because it is an Affiliate of Sutro) be deemed an Affiliate of SutroVax, or SutroVax (or any entity that would be an Affiliate of Sutro solely because it is an Affiliate of SutroVax) an Affiliate of Sutro.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by changing the definition of 'Affiliate' to include entities with collaborative agreements or information sharing practices, instead of entities under majority control (50% ownership). This contradicts other contract sections that rely on the original definition (50% ownership) to determine rights and obligations. The uncertainty introduced could create legal disputes over contract application to these new types of 'Affiliates'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.1 Supply. Pursuant to the terms and conditions of this Supply Agreement, Sutro agrees that it will Manufacture the Product(s) at the Facility(ies) for SutroVax and shall supply the Product(s) to SutroVax, its Affiliates, and any SutroVax CMO, for purposes of production of Vaccine Compositions (including development of processes for the production of Vaccine Compositions), solely for non-clinical research purposes or in Phase I or Phase II clinical trials of such Vaccine Compositions..
perturbation.justification: The original definition of "Affiliate" was based on control through ownership (at least 50% of voting securities). The changed definition expands the scope of "Affiliate" to include entities with business relationships or those who attend industry events together. This contradicts section 2.1, which grants supply rights to "SutroVax, its Affiliates, and any SutroVax CMO." Under the original definition, SutroVax's affiliates were clearly defined as entities under its control. Now, with the changed definition, a company with a mere 'business relationship' could potentially claim rights under 2.1, fundamentally altering the scope of the supply agreement and creating a contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 3.1 Invoices. Sutro shall invoice SutroVax at the time of each shipment of Product(s) for the Price for such shipment. SutroVax will pay such invoices within [***] days of receipt of invoice (including all required documentation) by SutroVax.
perturbation.changed_text: 3.1 Invoices. Sutro shall invoice SutroVax at the time of each shipment of Product(s) for the Price for such shipment. SutroVax will pay such invoices within [***] days of receipt of invoice (including all required documentation) by SutroVax, unless the invoice is disputed, in which case payment will be made within 120 days of dispute resolution.
perturbation.explanation: The added text creates an in-text contradiction by adding a condition for delayed payment (120 days after dispute resolution) that clashes with the original payment term of [***] days. This introduces uncertainty regarding payment deadlines and could lead to disputes over late fees or contract breach.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.1 Invoices. Sutro shall invoice SutroVax at the time of each shipment of Product(s) for the Price for such shipment. SutroVax will pay such invoices within [***] days of receipt of invoice (including all required documentation) by SutroVax, unless the invoice is disputed, in which case payment will be made within 120 days of dispute resolution.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a new payment term (120 days after dispute resolution) that directly conflicts with the original payment term of '[***] days'. This creates a contradiction as to when payment is due, which falls under the definition of Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction, where different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties. The contradicted text originally stated SutroVax will pay such invoices within [***] days. The addition of 'unless the invoice is disputed' introduces a condition that directly clashes with the original payment term.
